name: 沈词

appearance.face: 如玉面庞,清冷俊美,琥珀色眸子
appearance.distinguishing_features: 冷如冰湖的眼神,薄唇微抿时的讥诮

visual_reference: handsome ancient Chinese scholar-official, cold amber eyes, jade-like face, tall elegant figure in dark blue official robes, aloof expression, black hair in traditional style
personality: 端方持重,冷淡克制,内心深情但不善表达
desire: 保护陆姝仪,得到沈睿,后期挽回高令宁
flaw: 感情处理失当,伤害深爱之人
arc: 从算计婚姻→冷漠相待→后悔→卑微挽回

relationships.dynamic: 从利用到真爱,纠缠一生
